title: Elytra Bounce
description: Lets you hop against the ground with an Elytra!
body: ### Elytra Bounce Inspired by Elytra Hopping, Elytra Bounce is a simple, one-feature mod that adds the ability to consistently bounce off the ground as you're flying about with an Elytra, allowing you to build up momentum without the need for fireworks! To Bounce, simply hold down the jump button whilst in flight. Want to do away with fireworks entirely for a more interesting, skilful flying experience? Consider pairing this mod with Aileron! For a mod like this on 1.20.1 and 1.21.1, please check out [Chai's Elytra Enchants!](https://modrinth.com/mod/chais-elytra-enchants) It does pretty much the same thing! Hope you like it!
